<!-- Generated with https://github.com/reakaleek/gh-action-readme -->

# <!--name-->Commit Release Version<!--/name-->

<!--description-->
Commit package version changes, create an annotated tag, and push both to the release branch.
<!--/description-->

## Inputs

<!--inputs-->
| Name                | Description                                                               | Required | Default  |
|---------------------|---------------------------------------------------------------------------|----------|----------|
| `branch`            | Branch to push the release commit to.                                     | `true`   | ` `      |
| `tag`               | Release tag to create and push.                                           | `true`   | ` `      |
| `remote`            | Git remote name.                                                          | `false`  | `origin` |
| `commit-message`    | Release commit message. Defaults to chore: release <tag>.                 | `false`  | ` `      |
| `tag-message`       | Annotated tag message. Defaults to tag.                                   | `false`  | ` `      |
| `dry-run`           | Validate inputs and print status without committing, tagging, or pushing. | `false`  | `false`  |
| `working-directory` | Directory containing the Git checkout.                                    | `false`  | `.`      |
<!--/inputs-->

## Outputs

<!--outputs-->
| Name | Description |
|------|-------------|
<!--/outputs-->

## Usage

<!--usage action="Nick2bad4u/workflow-templates/.github/actions/commit-release-version" version="main"-->

```yaml
steps:
 - name: "Commit and push release version and tag"
   uses: "Nick2bad4u/workflow-templates/.github/actions/commit-release-version@main"
   with:
    branch: "${{ steps.target_ref.outputs.branch }}"
    tag: "${{ steps.version.outputs.tag }}"
```

<!--/usage-->
